title: Disable Button if Column is Empty
excerpt: Is there a way to disable/enable button based on another column? I’d like to disable the button unless certain criteria is met. ex. column is not empty, col 1,2,3 are not empty or =x. Thank you!

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to disable/enable button based on another column? I’d like to disable the button unless certain criteria is met. ex. column is not empty, col 1,2,3 are not empty or =x. Thank you!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KCordaro - you can add conditions to your automations behind the button, for example:

When button clicked, and only if column1 is not empty, [execute automation]
When button clicked, and only if column1 is empty, [notify user]/[create update]/etc.

Hope this helps!
Mark
